name: feed_the_colony_0.5
mission_description: Feed 3 colonists for 3 days with zero survival packs. Only 1 Hare at start (~17 raw meat = 3 simple meals = 2.7 nutrition). Two more Hares spawn at game hour 36 (mid-day 2). All 3 hares combined yield ~51 raw meat = ~9 simple meals = 8.1 nutrition. That is NOT ENOUGH: 3 colonists need 14.4 nutrition over 3 days. The only path to survival is the 20 pre-grown berry bushes: 200 berries -> 40 simple meals if harvested and cooked. The overseer's instinct is to hunt the hare first. That instinct is a trap here. Berries must be harvested on day 1 -- they provide 4x more food than all the animals combined. This is the plant-cutting mechanic gate.
